channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fridge Dumped in middle of road, 3rd April
item.description:
Old fridge dumped in the road see photo. This is dangerous and causing vehicle access issues. Please arrange to inspect and clear. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ramsden Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeat dog fouling, 3rd April
item.description:
Sick off having to come on here and asking for repeated dog fouling to be removed on pickford lane. All over the path again its obviously the same dog! Across the road from Butchers, 58 pickford lane. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Pickford Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big pile of commercial rubbish fly tipped, 3rd April
item.description:
See above. Things keep being fly tipped here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendyke Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on corner of St Kildas and Heathland Road N16, 3rd April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on corner of St Kildas and Heathland Road N16

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heathland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned shopping trolley, 3rd April
item.description:
Abandoned shopping trolley

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glebe Knoll, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders parking across our driveway blocking us in, 3rd April
item.description:
Building work started at 23 Hillcrest on 30th March. The builders park across our driveway with multiple vans completely blocking us in at 22 Hillcrest. These are not designated parking spaces.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hillcrest, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping down alley, 3rd April
item.description:
Behind the house on the corner people have dumped a load of rubbish restricting access to this alley. This area is a prime area for fly tipping and is consistently happening, can you not block this alley or do something to stop this happening?! Been happening for years now in this exact location.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ramsden Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not moved on months, 3rd April
item.description:
The bed hole not moved in months the state of it loos dumped, was hit in the hit in run a few weeks back and no one come near or by to see wing mirrors smashed off the bonnet cover lose inside dirty and a carrier bag holder window wipers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrow Manorway, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Washing machine in the road, 3rd April
item.description:
Somebody has dumped multiple washing machines on the pavement and the road. Dangerous for cars as have to swerve to avoid it!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ramsden Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: NO litter pick, 3rd April
item.description:
No litter pick prior to cutting grass in sholden gardens as always ,also shoddy work all round ,grass not blown away ,grass half finished really low standard work !
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22A,22B,22C,22D, Sholden Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish Lassa Road, 3rd April
item.description:
Dumped rubbish Lassa Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Everest Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain Glenure Road, 3rd April
item.description:
Blocked drain Glenure Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenesk Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Driver repeatedly blocking access, 3rd April
item.description:
This driver repeatedly is blocking access to the drive, parking halfway across and ignoring road markings. Please issue ticket

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ratcliffe Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish on Melbourne Grove Se22 outside small urban orchard, 3rd April
item.description:
Fly tipped rubbish on Melbourne Grove with junction of Lytcott Grove Se22 outside small urban orchard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 111, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbours using front garden as landfil, 3rd April
item.description:
This has been like this for months and must be breaking the terms of their lease.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Copleston Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic Light sensor fails to detect motorcycles, 3rd April
item.description:
Hello, The traffic light sensor on the slip road coming off the A2016 (bronze age way) taking a right turn onto Lower Road fails to detect motorcycles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Missing Street Signs, 3rd April
item.description:
On Foxgrove Road travelling in a direction where Convent Close is on the near side, there are 3 sign posts that are missing signs between this location and Westgate Road. Please can you replace the signs or remove the redundant street furniture altogether?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxgrove Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded stop lines, 3rd April
item.description:
Faded stop lines, they need repainting.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near junction of Rochester Road and Wilmot Place, 3rd April
item.description:
Voi scooter blocking clearly marked disabled parking bay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Rochester Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near junction of Rochester Road and Wilmot Place, 3rd April
item.description:
Forest bikes blocking clearly marked disabled parking bay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Rochester Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
